description: Rogue Frontier Patch 4 (26 March 2025) — Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes

subsections.heading: Conqueror’s Challenge Changes

items.text: Players can now view their stats and rewards from previous seasons by selecting them from a dropdown menu

subitems.text: Information for seasons prior to Season 26 cannot be viewed here

items.text: Conqueror’s Chest rewards now appear as a list of claimable items instead of a single chest

subitems.text: Players can claim items individually or use ‘Claim All’ to collect as much as their inventory space allows

items.text: Knight’s Vows and Avatars are sent directly to the inventory when claimed

subsections.searchable_text: Conqueror’s Challenge Changes Players can now view their stats and rewards from previous seasons by selecting them from a dropdown menu Information for seasons prior to Season 26 cannot be viewed here Conqueror’s Chest rewards now appear as a list of claimable items instead of a single chest Players can claim items individually or use ‘Claim All’ to collect as much as their inventory space allows Knight’s Vows and Avatars are sent directly to the inventory when claimed

subsections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Personal and Guild tabs within a Guild Bank are now visually distinguished

subsections.searchable_text: Other Changes Personal and Guild tabs within a Guild Bank are now visually distinguished

sections.searchable_text: Changes Conqueror’s Challenge Changes Players can now view their stats and rewards from previous seasons by selecting them from a dropdown menu Conqueror’s Chest rewards now appear as a list of claimable items instead of a single chest Knight’s Vows and Avatars are sent directly to the inventory when claimed Other Changes Personal and Guild tabs within a Guild Bank are now visually distinguished

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here .
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here .

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: Spell Fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue where enemies would continue having their buffs purged shortly after leaving the target area
Fixed issue where enemies could become invisible within the target area

items.text: Fixed issue where Holy Beam (Holy Staffs), Hover (Sandals of Purity), and Levitate (Cultist Robes) could have their channeled effects purged

subsections.searchable_text: Spell Fixes Enfeeble Blades (Lifecurse Staff) Fixed issue where enemies would continue having their buffs purged shortly after leaving the target area Fixed issue where enemies could become invisible within the target area Fixed issue where Holy Beam (Holy Staffs), Hover (Sandals of Purity), and Levitate (Cultist Robes) could have their channeled effects purged

subsections.heading: UI Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where removing an item from either the Main Hand or Off-Hand slot in the Loadouts menu would clear both slots
Fixed issue where Tracking Toolkits could be placed in the weapon slot when creating a Loadout
Fixed issue where the Overcharge confirmation pop-up could appear twice when using a hotkey
Fixed issue where Crystal Weapon combat and crafting specializations on the Destiny Board displayed incorrect bonus values
Fixed issue where the item icon in the furniture UI was selectable but not clickable with a controller

subitems.text: The icon is now clickable across all inputs to open the furniture item's details UI

subsections.searchable_text: UI Fixes Fixed issue where removing an item from either the Main Hand or Off-Hand slot in the Loadouts menu would clear both slots Fixed issue where Tracking Toolkits could be placed in the weapon slot when creating a Loadout Fixed issue where the Overcharge confirmation pop-up could appear twice when using a hotkey Fixed issue where Crystal Weapon combat and crafting specializations on the Destiny Board displayed incorrect bonus values Fixed issue where the item icon in the furniture UI was selectable but not clickable with a controller The icon is now clickable across all inputs to open the furniture item's details UI

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where the following mobs would deal significantly higher damage than intended
Fixed issue where items that cannot drop as loot could be listed for sale on the Black Market
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes

subsections.searchable_text: Other Fixes Fixed issue where the following mobs would deal significantly higher damage than intended Earthkeeper Shaman Avalonian High Priestess Sir Bedivere Castle Mortar Champion of Fort Sterling Bandit Ringleader Fixed issue where items that cannot drop as loot could be listed for sale on the Black Market Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
